task: format_filename in utils.py returns a filename for display, replacing any invalid bytes or surrogate escapes with the Unicode replacement character so the name can always be written to a stream. A reviewer found the encode/decode logic verbose; simplify it to return the filename as a string.
correctness_argument: The encode/decode round-trip is kept but expressed with early returns to reduce nesting. `errors='replace'` on both paths converts invalid bytes or surrogate escapes to the replacement character, so the result can always be written to a strict UTF-8 stream without UnicodeEncodeError.
